title: ChairTweaker
description: Lets mods and modpacks customize what things you can sit in
body: If you make MCreator mods, and you wanna add chairs, couches, stools, seats, or benches to your mod, use this!!! [Here's](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1unbMEqPWk8&lc=UgzGs_iDmiWhxa1v2wh4AaABAg) a video about how to use it to add chairs.<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/1unbMEqPWk8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
